name: New York Tuition Assistance Program (TAP)
sponsor: New York State Higher Education Services Corporation (HESC)

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen, permanent resident, or eligible non-citizen; NY resident
eligibility.other_requirements: Must be a New York State resident; enrolled full-time at an approved NYS postsecondary institution; income limits apply (under ~$125,000 household income for dependent students)

stackable_notes: State grant; stacks with federal Pell Grant; may reduce institutional aid depending on the school.
notes: TAP is a right for eligible NY residents — nearly automatic with FAFSA filing. Income thresholds adjusted periodically. Part of the Excelsior free-tuition promise for students at SUNY/CUNY when combined with other aid.
